message:
Running command: # The openroad-globalrouting.log has been reset to 0 bytes but GRT hasn't written output yet.
# The STA warnings are always printed to flow.log. GRT output goes to the step log.
# Let's check the pnr_v4.log to see current GRT progress
wc -l /tmp/pnr_v4.log
grep -n "GRT-0014\|NesterovSolve\|GRT-0096\|overflow:" /tmp/pnr_v4.log | tail -5
